jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates in Nashik is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates:
Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates!
